message:
fix(extensions): refresh snapshot in JsRuntimeHost::manager() to expose session handle

The JsRuntimeHost::manager() method reconstructs an ExtensionManager from
a Weak<Inner> reference but created a fresh empty snapshot. This meant
hostcall dispatch for pi.session() could not find the session handle
that was set on the original manager, causing "denied: No session
configured" errors in conformance_mock tests.

Fix: call refresh_snapshot_locked() after reconstruction so the new
manager reads session, extensions, and all state from the shared inner.

Also fix clippy lints in extension_replay.rs (redundant clone) and
keybindings.rs (cast_possible_truncation) from other agents' code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
